# Knowledge — agentic-bi-ops

## Claude-Code

| Title | Type | Ref | Note |
|-------|------|-----|------|
| awesome-claude-code — curated Claude Code ecosystem | repo | [https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code](https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code) | 49.7K stars. Coleccion curada de skills, subagentes, status lines, plugins y tooling de Claude Code. Fuente para descubrir patrones y herramientas del ecosistema. |
| Graphify (Graphify-Labs/graphify) — multi-modal knowledge graph | repo | [https://github.com/Graphify-Labs/graphify](https://github.com/Graphify-Labs/graphify) | MIT, ~93K stars. Multi-modal knowledge-graph skill (code + docs + PDFs + SQL schemas); peer of CodeGraph, its graph.html is an auto-generated architecture visual. Sanitization: code parse is local but doc/PDF extraction uses an LLM backend and graph.json/html may embed secrets — never commit them, trusted backend only in private repos. |
| wshobson/agents — multi-harness agentic plugin marketplace | repo | [https://github.com/wshobson/agents](https://github.com/wshobson/agents) | 37.8K stars, MIT. Marketplace de plugins/subagentes multi-harness (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini). Peer directo de agentic-board; referente de como estructurar subagentes y coordinacion. |

## Diagrams

| Title | Type | Ref | Note |
|-------|------|-----|------|
| D2 (Terrastruct) | repo | [https://github.com/terrastruct/d2](https://github.com/terrastruct/d2) | Cleaner architecture diagrams than Mermaid for dense graphs; needs external render (not inline on GitHub) — escalation target via Kroki. |
| Graphviz (DOT) | url | [https://graphviz.org/](https://graphviz.org/) | DOT language for large/dense dependency graphs; render via Kroki or the graphviz CLI. Escalation target when Mermaid gets illegible. |
| Kroki — universal diagram render | url | [https://kroki.io/](https://kroki.io/) | Renders Mermaid/D2/Graphviz/PlantUML to SVG/PNG via a URL — the render path when a diagram is not inline-native and must be embedded as an image. |
| Mermaid — diagram-as-code | repo | [https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid) | Diagram-as-code. GitHub and Claude render fenced mermaid blocks natively — the plugin default, zero build step. |

## Docs-Publishing

| Title | Type | Ref | Note |
|-------|------|-----|------|
| DeepWiki (Cognition) | url | [https://deepwiki.com](https://deepwiki.com) | Hosted AI wiki generator for public repos: prose + diagrams from the code, zero setup, re-index on demand. Verified 2026-07-23: knows CSalcedoDataBI/agentic-board but Not Indexed - one click to index. Private repos need paid Devin. |
| deepwiki-open | repo | [https://github.com/AsyncFuncAI/deepwiki-open](https://github.com/AsyncFuncAI/deepwiki-open) | MIT, 17.4k stars, active. UNOFFICIAL reimplementation of DeepWiki, self-hosted, needs LLM API keys; author is pivoting to paid grok-wiki.com. Generates its own site, NOT a GitHub Wiki. |
| github-wiki-action | repo | [https://github.com/Andrew-Chen-Wang/github-wiki-action](https://github.com/Andrew-Chen-Wang/github-wiki-action) | Apache-2.0, 107 stars, pushed 2026-07-11 - the liveliest GitHub Wiki publishing action. Solves only the PUSH mechanics (already solved in Publish-DocsWiki.ps1), not the content problem. gh search code: appears almost only in awesome-lists, near-zero real workflow adoption. |
| wiki-sync-action (New Relic) | repo | [https://github.com/newrelic/wiki-sync-action](https://github.com/newrelic/wiki-sync-action) | Apache-2.0, 34 stars, last push 2024-08-27 (stale). Two-way repo<->wiki sync. Same limit: push mechanics only. |

## Multi-Agent-Orchestration

| Title | Type | Ref | Note |
|-------|------|-----|------|
| CrewAI — role-playing autonomous agent orchestration | repo | [https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI](https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI) | 55.3K stars, MIT. Framework para orquestar agentes autonomos con roles colaborativos. Referente de patrones de coordinacion (roles, tareas, delegacion) para el fleet de /board work. |
| Microsoft AutoGen — agentic AI programming framework | repo | [https://github.com/microsoft/autogen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) | 59.6K stars, CC-BY-4.0. Framework de Microsoft para AI agentica multi-agente (conversaciones entre agentes, group chat). Referente de arquitectura de coordinacion. |
| Ruflo (ruvnet/ruflo) — agent meta-harness | repo | [https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo) | 63.9K stars, MIT. Multi-player agent swarms, self-learning memory, coordinated autonomous workflows over Claude Code/Codex. Referente de coordinacion multi-agente para /board work fleet. |

## PowerBI

| Title | Type | Ref | Note |
|-------|------|-----|------|
| microsoft/skills-for-fabric - marketplace | repo | [https://github.com/microsoft/skills-for-fabric](https://github.com/microsoft/skills-for-fabric) | MIT first-party marketplace of Fabric/PBI agent skills. Source of the powerbi-authoring plugin (bundles all skills above + registers the Modeling MCP). Cross-tool: Copilot CLI, VS Code, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf. |
| Power BI Agentic overview | url | [https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-agentic-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-agentic-overview) | Umbrella: curated bundle of agent skills + tools (powerbi-authoring plugin) that turns NL prompts into PBI semantic models and reports. Install seed for the BI toolkit. |
| Power BI Desktop Bridge (preview) | url | [https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-desktop-bridge-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-desktop-bridge-overview) | Tool: local server inside the PBI Desktop process (named pipe, JSON-RPC 2.0, local only) so agents reload models and capture screenshots for visual verification. |
| Power BI MCP servers (local + remote) | url | [https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/mcp/mcp-servers-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/mcp/mcp-servers-overview) | Tool: local Modeling MCP (@microsoft/powerbi-modeling-mcp, edits models in Desktop/Fabric/PBIP, runs DAX) and remote MCP (api.fabric.microsoft.com, query/insights, needs Entra OAuth). |
| Power BI report authoring skill | url | [https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-report-authoring-skill-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-report-authoring-skill-overview) | Agent skill: create/edit/validate PBIR report definitions (pages, visuals, filters, themes). Writes the files; pairs with Desktop Bridge for reload+screenshot. |
| Power BI Report design skill | url | [https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-report-design-skill-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-report-design-skill-overview) | Agent skill: opinionated design guidance (archetypes, chart choice, color, typography, theme). Emits a YAML design brief; hands off to Report Authoring. Does NOT write PBIR. |
| Power BI Report planner and management skills | url | [https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-planner-fabric-skill-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/power-bi-planner-fabric-skill-overview) | Planner orchestrates the design -> plan -> author -> publish pipeline; Management gets/publishes/manages reports in Fabric workspaces. |
| Semantic model authoring skill | url | [https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/semantic-model-authoring-skill-overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/power-bi/developer/agentic/semantic-model-authoring-skill-overview) | Agent skill: create/edit/deploy PBI semantic models (Import/DirectQuery/Direct Lake), DAX, relationships, refresh, AI-readiness. Routes to Modeling MCP first. |
